path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Diesel engine
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: The primary V12 internal combustion engine block configured to deliver high-torque mechanical power for marine propulsion or power generation.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Engine auxiliary systems
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: The complete external support assembly integrating air intake filtration, turbochargers, exhaust routing, and heat exchangers.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Flange cover plate
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A triangular triangular-flange sealing plate secured by three bolts, used to cover access ports or structural fluid housing on the engine.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Mounting hardware brackets
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A small assembly of structural support brackets and hexagonal spacers used to align and secure peripheral engine components.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Anti-vibration mounts
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A pair of heavy-duty structural dampening feet equipped with securing studs and mounting baseplates to isolate engine vibrations.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/111.title: Main deck plating
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/111.description: Represents the primary structural plating of the main deck level, serving as the boundary between the upper structures and the lower compartments.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/114.title: Structural base supports
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/114.description: Heavy-duty structural elements designed to distribute loads and provide rigid support for the deck plating and machinery foundations.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.title: Machinery foundation
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.description: Heavy structural bedplate designed to support main machinery, ensuring rigid alignment and effective vibration damping across the hull.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.title: Foundation base plate
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.description: The structural bottom plate that provides the primary surface for mounting machinery elements.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.title: Foundation girder
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.description: Longitudinal structural beam running fore and aft to distribute weight and resist bending stresses.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.title: Transverse beam
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.description: Transverse bracing element providing lateral stiffness and structural integrity to the machinery bed.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.title: Foundation stiffener panel
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.description: Internal reinforcement plate designed to eliminate local vibrations and buckling under heavy loads.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.title: Mounting bed component
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/113.description: Anchoring and support structure section optimized for securing heavy engine room machinery.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.title: Hull plating
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.description: The outermost structural shell of the ship, providing watertight integrity and defining the vessel's hydrodynamic shape.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.title: Side shell plating
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.description: The vertical or near-vertical sections of the hull plating that form the sides of the vessel's structure.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.title: Bilge plating section
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.description: The curved transition zone of the hull that connects the vertical side plating to the flat bottom structure.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.title: Bottom shell plating
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/11_Floor/112.description: The lowermost horizontal plates of the hull structure, forming the flat bottom section of the ship.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.title: Transverse hull frames
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.description: The vertical ribs of the ship's structure that provide lateral stiffness to the side shell plating and resist external water pressure.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.title: Bottom transverse floors
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.description: Deep vertical plates extending across the bottom of the ship to support the lower inner structure and strengthen the double bottom.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.title: Longitudinal bottom girders
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.description: Continuous longitudinal structural plates running along the bottom grid to provide longitudinal bending resistance.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.title: Primary access manhole
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.description: The main watertight service hatch used for entry and ventilation of the lower compartment.

path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.title: Secondary access manhole
path:Scene/FULL/1_Structure/12_Underwate.description: An auxiliary watertight inspection hatch providing an alternative entry or inspection point for the tank layout.

path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/22_Port.title: Generator exhaust system
path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/22_Port.description: The structural piping and insulation network designed to safely guide and discharge exhaust gases from the port side auxiliary generator.

path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/22_Port.title: Generator exhaust piping
path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/22_Port.description: High-temperature resistant ducting section that routes combustion gases from the engine manifold toward the main silencer.

path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/21_Vent.title: Room ventilation
path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/21_Vent.description: The air supply and extraction network designed to maintain optimal ambient temperatures, manage humidity, and provide fresh air to the machinery compartments.

path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/21_Vent.title: Ventilation duct
path:Scene/FULL/2_Exhaust_system/21_Vent.description: A structural air channel section responsible for routing and distributing airflow efficiently throughout the interior space.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.title: Tightening bolts
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.description: Threaded tie rods engineered to compress the plate pack together, preventing internal leaks and maintaining pressure sealing.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.title: Locking nuts
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.description: Heavy-duty hexagonal fasteners fitted onto the tie rods to secure and maintain the correct compression torque on the frame.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.title: Plate pack
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.description: A series of corrugated metal plates arranged together to form channels for fluids to transfer heat without mixing.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.title: Frame plate
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.description: The heavy stationary steel front panel that supports the piping connections and withstands internal clamping forces.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.title: Frame plate 2
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.description: The heavy stationary steel front panel that supports the piping connections and withstands internal clamping forces.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.title: Pressure plate
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.description: The movable steel rear panel adjusted along the carrying bar to apply even compression across the entire plate pack.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.title: Pressure plate
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/3.description: The movable steel rear panel adjusted along the carrying bar to apply even compression across the entire plate pack.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/S.title: Support foot
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/S.description: A rigid mounting bracket that secures the heat exchanger unit to the engine room floor framework.

path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/S.title: Support foot 2
path:Scene/FULL/3_Plate_heat_exchanger/S.description: A rigid mounting bracket that secures the heat exchanger unit to the engine room floor framework.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/41_Port.title: Generator skid
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/41_Port.description: The heavy-duty steel base frame that holds both the diesel engine and the alternator aligned, isolating vibrations from the ship's hull.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/42_Exha.title: Exhaust insulation
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/42_Exha.description: Thermal blankets or protective lagging designed to jacket high-temperature exhaust components, preventing heat dissipation into the room.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Generator nuts
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: Cast nuts that serve to hold the generator in place and absorb vibrations.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: plug from the generator
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: A plug that is made of metal and is marked in red

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Engine auxiliary systems
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: The collection of external support loops, including fuel lines, filtration units, and fluid manifolds attached to the generator engine.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Oil dipstick
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: A manual gauge tool used to check the lube oil level and fluid condition inside the engine oil pan.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Generator unit
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: The combined auxiliary diesel engine and alternator assembly that generates electrical power for the vessel.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Support fittings
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: A collection of heavy-duty brackets, clamps, and pipe fittings configured for hardware installation across the generator.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Anti-vibration mount
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: A heavy-duty structural bushing designed to absorb mechanical dampening forces and reduce vibration transfer across engine components.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Mounting nuts
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: A collection of heavy-duty hexagonal fasteners used to securely clamp and lock various auxiliary components onto the engine block.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Power alternator
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: The electrical machine coupled to the engine that converts mechanical rotation into electrical energy for the ship's grid.

path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.title: Alternator terminal box
path:Scene/FULL/4_Port_Generator/43_Port.description: The electrical enclosure housing the main output terminals and cable connections for the power alternator.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/54_Fue.title: Fuel filters
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/54_Fue.description: A dual-stage filtration unit designed to remove solid contaminants and water from the fuel supply line before it reaches the fuel injectors.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Lube oil filters
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A multi-canister fluid filtration assembly equipped with bypass valves to continuously clean and distribute lubricating oil through the engine.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Valve handle lever
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A heavy-duty manual control lever designed to actuate the fluid bypass or isolation valve on the filter assembly.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Turbocharger assembly
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A dual turbocharger configuration and associated mounting hardware designed to force compressed air into the engine cylinders for combustion.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Protective port caps
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A pair of small protective caps designed to seal auxiliary ports, test points, or fluid openings from environmental contamination.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Vibration damping pads
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A pair of molded structural isolation pads designed to reduce mechanical vibration and noise transmission between engine components.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.title: Engine flange gaskets
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/51_Mai.description: A pair of flat sealing gaskets designed to fit between piping flanges to prevent fluid or gas leaks under pressure.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A small individual protective cap configured to seal auxiliary diagnostic ports or fluid openings from contamination.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.title: Vibration damping pad
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A molded isolation pad configured to reduce mechanical vibration and noise transmission on the stern engine framework.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A collection of auxiliary hose lines, threaded adapter unions, T-junctions, and monitoring hardware designed for the stern propulsion system plumbing.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A mechanical mounting clamp integrated with rigid fluid lines and structural support bars designed for secure routing on the stern section.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A small mechanical pump unit integrated with an extended rigid fluid distribution line configured for the stern engine framework.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A comprehensive structural casing assembly incorporating the main rear enclosure, secondary mounting rails, and auxiliary fluid components on the stern engine framework.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.title: Protective plug kit
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A small set of individual rubberized caps and sealing plugs configured to protect auxiliary diagnostic ports or structural access points from contamination.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/52_Gea.description: A secondary hardware pairing consisting of a flexible routing line and a molded isolation pad configured for the stern framework layout.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/55_Mai.description: A pair of heavy-duty structural steel girders equipped with vertical reinforcing ribs, designed to form the rigid base foundation for the stern propulsion machinery.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/55_Mai.title: Structural mounting plate
path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/55_Mai.description: An individual heavy-gauge steel reinforcement plate with a machined notch, designed for interlocking alignment within the engine foundation bedplate assembly.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/53_Fil.description: A small cylindrical threaded sleeve configured to connect fluid lines or secure structural interfaces within the primary filtration assembly layout.

path:Scene/FULL/5_Main_engine_No1/53_Fil.description: A small cylindrical threaded sleeve configured to connect fluid lines or secure structural interfaces within the secondary filtration assembly layout.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/63_Azipod_.description: No 3D render data available. This metadata slot exists in the system layout, but the visual geometry for this transmission component is missing or failed to load.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: A precise hardware compilation featuring an auxiliary instrumentation sensor, alignment pins, and secondary sealing fasteners for the drivetrain housing.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: A heavy-duty hydraulic control valve unit fitted with an integrated actuator cylinder designed to regulate oil fluid routing within the transmission system.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: A small hardware pairing featuring a cylindrical protective cap and an alignment pin configured for the auxiliary transmission valve assembly.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: A small secondary hardware grouping comprising a flat circular sealing disk and a miniature positioning plate configured for the transmission valve assembly.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.title: Control rod guide
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: A vertical structural rod fitted with an integrated rectangular channel profile, designed to route control cables or guide mechanical linkage near the transmission manifold.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.title: Valve fastener kit
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: An elliptic array of individual hexagonal mounting bolts configured to distribute uniform clamping pressure across the transmission valve housing flange.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.title: Valve sealing gasket
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: A molded elastomeric sealing ring configured to fit the transmission valve flange interface, ensuring a leak-proof barrier against hydraulic fluid loss.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.title: Valve plug kit
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: "A hardware assembly featuring an elliptical layout of hex blanking caps and a central diagnostic port fitting configured for the transmission valve block.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.title: Valve O-ring seal
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/62_Transmi.description: A precise elastomeric circular seal designed to provide a leak-proof interface for auxiliary port connections on the transmission valve block.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.title: Transmission drive shaft
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.description: A precision-machined rotating shaft assembly designed to transmit torque and maintain axial alignment within the primary drivetrain system.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.title: Structural mounting rails
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.description: A pair of parallel metal rails supported by vertical columns, designed to provide a rigid foundation for positioning heavy machinery components.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.title: Access panel hinges
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.description: A series of mechanical hinge assemblies configured for mounting service access covers or protective plating along the drivetrain structural rails.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.title: Locking retaining nut
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.description: A precision-machined yellow locking nut featuring external lugs, designed to secure internal drivetrain components and maintain axial position under load.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.title: Protective curved guard
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.description: A lightweight curved protective shell designed to shield exposed cabling or small mechanical components from external wear and impact.

path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.title: Panel mounting bracket
path:Scene/FULL/6_Transmition/61_Full_Sh.description: A heavy-duty mounting bracket featuring a precision-drilled fastener hole, designed for secure installation of protective panels on the engine support rails.

path:Scene/FULL/9_Propeller/93_Propeller.title: Thrust propeller assembly
path:Scene/FULL/9_Propeller/93_Propeller.description: A high-performance blade assembly precision-balanced for optimal water displacement, thrust generation, and propulsion efficiency in marine environments.

path:Scene/FULL/9_Propeller/92_Motor_Hea.title: Propulsion motor housing
path:Scene/FULL/9_Propeller/92_Motor_Hea.description: The primary submersible motor casing engineered for hydrodynamic efficiency, housing the internal electric drive components and cooling passages.

path:Scene/FULL/9_Propeller/91_Motor_con.title: Motor mounting flange
path:Scene/FULL/9_Propeller/91_Motor_con.description: A heavy-duty structural interface designed to securely anchor the propulsion motor housing to the vessel's stern transom and main support rails.

path:Scene/FULL/13_Duplex_Oil_strainer.title: Duplex oil filtration unit
path:Scene/FULL/13_Duplex_Oil_strainer.description: A redundant filtration system featuring dual canisters, designed for the continuous removal of contaminants from the engine lubricating oil circuit.

path:Scene/FULL/12_Service_Air_Reciever/.title: CO2 fire suppression
path:Scene/FULL/12_Service_Air_Reciever/.description: A high-pressure CO2 fire extinguishing manifold assembly, engineered for rapid total-flooding protection of machinery spaces in the event of fire.

path:Scene/FULL/12_Service_Air_Reciever/.title: Service air tank
path:Scene/FULL/12_Service_Air_Reciever/.description: A high-capacity pressure vessel engineered to store and stabilize compressed air, ensuring consistent pressure for shipboard pneumatic equipment and auxiliary service lines.

path:Scene/FULL/12_Service_Air_Reciever/.title: Plate heat exchanger
path:Scene/FULL/12_Service_Air_Reciever/.description: A high-efficiency thermal transfer unit featuring stacked corrugated plates, designed for rapid heat exchange between distinct fluid circuits within the vessel's cooling system.

path:Scene/FULL/11_Lube_oil_tank/Object_.title: Lubrication oil tank
path:Scene/FULL/11_Lube_oil_tank/Object_.description: A dedicated storage reservoir engineered to maintain a constant supply of lubricating oil, ensuring optimal cooling and wear reduction for primary propulsion engine bearings and moving parts.

path:Scene/FULL/11_Lube_oil_tank/Object_.title: Port generator set
path:Scene/FULL/11_Lube_oil_tank/Object_.description: A marine-grade auxiliary generator assembly designed to provide reliable electrical power for vessel operations, consisting of a primary drive engine coupled to an electrical power generator unit.

path:Scene/FULL/11_Lube_oil_tank/Object_.title: Inspection hatch nuts
path:Scene/FULL/11_Lube_oil_tank/Object_.description: A series of heavy-duty securing nuts designed to fasten and provide a compression seal for the lube oil tank inspection hatch, ensuring the integrity and leak-proof state of the lubrication system.

path:Scene/FULL/10_Fire_System/107_Phone.title: Marine communication phone
path:Scene/FULL/10_Fire_System/107_Phone.description: A ruggedized, weather-resistant industrial handset engineered for reliable internal voice communication within high-noise machinery spaces.

path:Scene/FULL/10_Fire_System/106_Alarm.title: Alarm mount
